      Methods in org.arakhne.neteditor.android.activity that return Figure 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Figure FigureView.getFigureAt(float x, float y)
      Replies the figure at the given coordinate.
      Figure FigureView.getFigureAt(int index) 
      Figure FigureView.getFigureIn(Rectangle2f bounds)
      Replies the first figure that are inside the specified bounds.
      Figure FigureView.getFigureOn(Shape2f bounds)
      Replies the first figure that are intersecting the specified bounds.
      Figure FigureView.getFigureWithBoundsAt(float x, float y)
      Replies the figure that has its bounds with the specified point inside.
      Figure FigureView.removeFigureAt(int index) 
      Methods in org.arakhne.neteditor.android.activity that return types with arguments of type Figure 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Collection<? extends Figure> FigureView.getFigures()
      Replies the figures in the container.
      Set<Figure> FigureView.getFiguresIn(Rectangle2f bounds)
      Replies the figures that are inside the specified bounds.
      Set<Figure> FigureView.getFiguresOn(Shape2f bounds)
      Replies the figures that are intersecting the specified bounds.

      void FigureView.EventHandler.componentRemoval(Figure figure) 
      void FigureView.EventHandler.componentRemoval(Figure parent, SubFigure subfigure)

      Notifies the listeners about the addition of a figure.
      protected void FigureView.fireFigureChanged(Figure changed)
      Notifies the listeners about the change of a figure.
      protected void FigureView.fireFigureRemoved(Figure removed)
      Notifies the listeners about the removal of a figure.
      int FigureView.indexOfFigure(Figure figure)
      Replies the index of the figure.
      int FigureView.moveFigureAt(Figure figure, int index)
      Move the figure at the specified position in the layers used by this panel.
      void FigureView.moveFigureBackground(Figure figure)
      Move the figure at the background in the layers used by this panel.
      void FigureView.moveFigureDown(Figure figure)
      Move the figure down in the layers used by this panel.
      void FigureView.moveFigureFront(Figure figure)
      Move the figure at the front in the layers used by this panel.
      void FigureView.moveFigureUp(Figure figure)
      Move the figure up in the layers used by this panel.

      Invoked when the user want to perform the standard action on the given figures.
      protected void AbstractEditorActivity.onSecondaryActionPerformed(boolean isEditionEnabled, Figure... figures)
      Invoked when the user want to perform the standard secondary action on the given figures.

      int FigureView.removeFigure(Figure component, boolean unlinkToModelObject)
      Remove the specified component.
      void FigureView.repaint(Figure figure)
      Refresh the drawing area covered by the given figure.

      This interface represents a figure that is drawn as a block.

      This interface represents the model element figures.

      This class is the base class for basic drawing objects such as rectangles, lines, text, circles, etc.

      Methods in org.arakhne.neteditor.swing that return Figure 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Figure JFigureView.getFigureAt(float x, float y)
      Replies the figure that has the specified point in its shape.
      Figure JFigureView.getFigureAt(int index)
      Replies the element at the specified index.
      Figure JFigureView.getFigureIn(Rectangle2f bounds)
      Replies the first figure that are inside the specified bounds.
      Figure JFigureView.getFigureOn(Shape2f bounds)
      Replies the first figure that are intersecting the specified bounds.
      Figure JFigureView.getFigureWithBoundsAt(float x, float y)
      Replies the figu with the precision re that has its bounds with the specified point inside.
      Figure JFigureView.removeFigureAt(int index)
      Remove the element at the specified index.

      Replies the figures that are intersecting the specified bounds.

      Move the figure at the specified position in the layers used by this panel.

      Move the figure at the background in the layers used by this panel.

      Move the figure down in the layers used by this panel.

      Move the figure at the front in the layers used by this panel.
      void JFigureView.moveFigureUp(Figure figure)
      Move the figure up in the layers used by this panel.
